case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. BRENDA SANTA et al

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-30-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT BRENDA PIEDRASANTA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: DEFENDANT BRENDA PREDRASANTA MUST PAY FIRST APPEARANCE FEES BEFORE FILING ANY DOCUMENTS. FEE WAIVER WAS DENIED ON 5/30/12. (206)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTA, BRENDA SANTA, SUSAN AGUILAR, EVELYN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1624 25TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
